Just A Small Thing For You
tap the candle to blow it out
For the one who runs the ward and still finds time to run errands with me

HAPPY BIRTHDAY,
KO KO

Open. Read. Smile. Repeat.

I don't know how to make this day as good as you make every ordinary one, but I wanted to try.

You're the kind of person who takes care of everyone else all day — steady hands, steady heart — and somehow still comes home with room left to take care of me too. I notice that. I don't say it enough, but I notice it every time.

So today isn't about being extra put-together or perfect. It's just about you — the version of you that laughs too loud at bad jokes, that walks a little faster in new sneakers, that shows up even on the hardest days. That's the person I'm celebrating.

Here's to another year of you being exactly who you are — and me getting to watch it happen up close.

Happy birthday, love. I'm so glad I get to be yours.
✏️ this message is a draft — edit freely before you send the link
Always in motion
Always taking care
Est. today
